positive: A minimalist, geometric line art representation of a cosmic forest scene. The main subjects are stylized, interconnecting alien flora and fauna—imaginary trees with spiral leaves, crystalline moths, and bioluminescent pod shapes. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, suitable for a full-chest print. Utilize a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, and warm gold accents. The style should be a blend of Art Deco patterns and negative space illustration, achieved with precise, clean outlines (line art style). Use thick, impactful outlines and negative space to define the forms. Ideal lighting is ethereal and diffuse, emphasizing the glowing elements. Focus on abstract beauty and clean scalability for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, grainy, text, watermark, signatures, logos, writing, disfigured, bad anatomy, multiple subjects, low resolution, photorealistic, sketch, painting, gradients, smudge, noise
